description: Declarative manifest of the 13 GitHub milestones for Phases 2–14 (P2-I01). Titles and descriptions must match the live GitHub state exactly. due_on is always null per the project rule against fabricated due dates.

milestones.title: Phase 2 — Project management setup
milestones.description: Mirror PLAN/TODO into GitHub milestones, issues, and the baseline label vocabulary; record the TODO ↔ issue ↔ milestone ↔ PRD mapping. See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 2.

milestones.title: Phase 3 — Topic and scope
milestones.description: Lock audience, depth, BiDi balance, citation density in docs/PRD.md §22. See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 3.

milestones.title: Phase 4 — CrewAI architecture design
milestones.description: Specify the 8 agents from PRD §8.3 with role/goal/backstory/tools, define ≥5 tasks (≥3 with context), and draft initial prompts. Default Process is sequential (FR-8). See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 4.

milestones.title: Phase 5 — Provider/service layer and tools
milestones.description: Implement controlled provider/service layer (NFR-23), add `.env.example` (FR-4), and implement 5 agent tools: search, file I/O, Markdown conversion, LaTeX compile, graph. Dependencies added via `uv add` per tool — no speculative installs. See `docs/PLAN.md` §Phase 5.

milestones.title: Phase 6 — Markdown-first content pipeline
milestones.description: Generate approved Markdown drafts at results/generated_markdown/ (canonical per FR-12) with the required placeholders; run a human review gate before any LaTeX conversion (FR-14, NFR-19). See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 6.

milestones.title: Phase 7 — Real-source and bibliography pipeline
milestones.description: Verify the 10 manifest sources, populate references.bib, resolve every \cite{...}; no fabricated sources per docs/PRD_bibliography_and_citations.md. See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 7.

milestones.title: Phase 8 — Python graph generation pipeline
milestones.description: Implement src/agentic_publishing_pipeline/visualization/; produce ≥1 graph image under latex_project/figures/ consumed by a chapter via \includegraphics. See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 8.

milestones.title: Phase 9 — LaTeX project assembly
milestones.description: Build the structured LaTeX project per PRD §8.5 / §14.3 (LuaLaTeX MVP, David CLM + Latin Modern Roman, FR-17a–d separation). See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 9.

milestones.title: Phase 10 — PDF build pipeline
milestones.description: Multi-pass build (LuaLaTeX → biber → LuaLaTeX → LuaLaTeX, plus makeindex / makenomenclature) producing results/final.pdf. See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 10.

milestones.title: Phase 11 — Deterministic ValidatorService
milestones.description: Implement deterministic ValidatorService that runs after the Reviewer Agent; never the LLM as source of truth (FR-40 / NFR-19). See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 11.

milestones.title: Phase 12 — Tests, lint, and reproducibility
milestones.description: Real tests for provider layer, tools, Markdown→LaTeX conversion, visualization, ValidatorService; uv run pytest and uv run ruff check . green; reproducibility documented. See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 12.

milestones.title: Phase 13 — README, AI usage, and prompt log finalization
milestones.description: Bring README.md, docs/AI_USAGE.md, docs/PROMPTS.md to current architecture and real run state; align SUBMISSION_CHECKLIST.md with PRD §14. See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 13.

milestones.title: Phase 14 — Final submission packaging
milestones.description: Moodle wrapper PDF from the official template, <GROUP_CODE>-ex03.pdf filename, per-member Moodle submissions, all SUBMISSION_CHECKLIST.md checkboxes individually satisfied. See docs/PLAN.md §Phase 14.
